final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing screenshot-style illustration of a 抖音 live-stream featuring a young woman resembling a "神仙姐姐" aesthetic.

Style/medium: needs a realistic live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical, mimicking a 抖音 live-stream UI layout with on-screen overlays (viewer count, comments, gift animations, etc.)
Subject: must include a young woman with an ethereal "神仙姐姐" appearance holding up a sign with both hands
Scene/backdrop: needs a live-stream room atmosphere — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, flattering live-stream lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign she is holding
Constraints: must preserve 抖音 live-stream UI visual language (top bar, comment feed, interaction icons); sign must be clearly legible and held facing the camera
Avoid:
